title: Project Wizard, How to Use
description:
Project Wizard, How to Use

How to Use [Wizard] Command

Step1.

(1) Start project wizard by one of three ways.

a.    On the Epson RC+ toolbar, click the [Project Wizard] button.

b.    On the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu, select [Project]-[Project Wizard].

c.    Select [Create New Project] in [Start Window] that displayed when Epson RC+ 8.0 started.

(2) Enter a name and select the save destination for the new project.

When specifying a new destination, click the [...] button to set the save destination. Set the destination in advance in the Epson RC+ menu, [Setup]-[Preferences]-[Workspace]-[Project Save Destination].

Select a project type you want to create, described in next page.

A: Empty project

B: From template

C: Pick and place without vision

D: Pick and place with vision

Next steps vary according to the selected project type.
